title: He Built $100B at Google, Then Failed. Now He Runs an $80B+ Company | Snowflake, Sridhar Ramaswamy
summary: Sridhar Ramaswamy, CEO of Snowflake, discusses his career arc from building Google's ad business to founding Neeva (a failed search engine startup) and now leading Snowflake's transition into the AI era. He shares lessons on leadership principles, hiring adaptable talent, staying close to product, and resilience after failure.
writeup: Sridhar Ramaswamy traces his path from scaling Google's advertising business into a roughly $100B operation, through founding the search startup Neeva that failed, to his current role as CEO of Snowflake. The conversation focuses on leading Snowflake's shift into the AI era, with attention to product focus and strategy. Ramaswamy draws out concrete leadership lessons: hiring adaptable talent, staying close to the product, and building resilience after a failure.
